RTG Soccer

Matte MetalSoccer

Ready to Grade / Autographed / Serial Numbered

A metal-finish soccer set: four matte-metal Base finishes, a Premium Base foil ladder, all-1/1 Brushed Oil and Artist Proof art subsets, and dual and triple on-card autographs. Toggle a subset between Autograph and Base to see its foils, parallels and numbering.

Matte Metal SoccerProduction Checklist◆ Wild Card

Checklist generated from the production master for grading submission and collector reference. Numbering is shown per parallel within each foil board: 1/1 = one-of-one, /N = numbered to N. Player names are listed as recorded in production and span legends and active players across eras.
